_meta.description: Primary-board fee and timeline overrides for pharmacy technician state pages.

fees_endorsement.total_estimated_cost: $120 plus any fingerprint or vendor fees

faq_answers.cost: The California State Board of Pharmacy fee schedule lists a $120 pharmacy technician application fee effective January 1, 2025. The biennial renewal fee is $150.
faq_answers.timeline: The board says to allow 45 days to process a pharmacy technician application before checking status.

quick_facts.fee_breakdown: $50 application fee + $50 licensure fee + $5 unlicensed activity fee
quick_facts.processing_time: Please allow 30 days for initial review

reciprocity.processing_time: Please allow 30 days for initial review

faq_answers.cost: The Florida Board of Pharmacy lists a total initial registered pharmacy technician fee of $105: $50 application, $50 licensure, and a $5 unlicensed activity fee. The biennial renewal fee is $55.
faq_answers.timeline: The Florida Board of Pharmacy says to allow 30 days for initial review of a registered pharmacy technician application.

fees_endorsement.background_check_fee: Fingerprint clearance card fee paid separately

faq_answers.cost: The Arizona State Board of Pharmacy lists an $82 pharmacy technician application fee and a $72 renewal fee.
faq_answers.timeline: The Arizona State Board of Pharmacy does not publish a public pharmacy technician processing timeline on its licensing page. Use the board's application status tools to check progress.

faq_answers.cost: The Ohio Board of Pharmacy fee schedule lists a $65 registration fee for registered and certified pharmacy technicians. The board's September 2025 fee notice says the same amount applies to initial, renewal, and reinstatement applications.
faq_answers.timeline: The Ohio Board of Pharmacy says the application review process for registered pharmacy technician applications normally occurs within 10 to 15 business days of submission.

quick_facts.renewal_cycle: Annual renewal window May 2 to June 30

faq_answers.cost: The Montana Board of Pharmacy lists a $35 application fee for a certified pharmacy technician. The active renewal fee is $30.
faq_answers.timeline: The Montana Board of Pharmacy does not publish a public pharmacy technician processing timeline on its licensing page.

quick_facts.renewal_cycle: Every 2 years, on or before the last day of the original issue month
quick_facts.processing_time: Allow a minimum of 6 weeks for review and processing

reciprocity.processing_time: Allow a minimum of 6 weeks for review and processing

faq_answers.cost: The Texas State Board of Pharmacy lists an $81 initial pharmacy technician registration fee in its current fee materials. Fingerprinting is paid separately to the vendor.
faq_answers.timeline: The Texas State Board of Pharmacy says to allow a minimum of six weeks for a pharmacy technician application to be reviewed and processed.

quick_facts.renewal_cycle: Every 2 years, on or before your birthday

faq_answers.cost: The Washington Department of Health lists a $140 original pharmacy technician credential fee and a $140 renewal fee.
faq_answers.timeline: Washington does not publish a public pharmacy technician processing timeline on its licensing information page. Use the board application tools and provider search to check status.

quick_facts.renewal_cycle: Annual renewal period November 1 through December 31
quick_facts.processing_time: Allow 3 to 5 business days for board review

reciprocity.processing_time: Allow 3 to 5 business days for board review

faq_answers.cost: The North Carolina Board of Pharmacy lists a $30 pharmacy technician registration fee and a $30 annual renewal fee.
faq_answers.timeline: The North Carolina Board of Pharmacy says pharmacy technician applications are usually reviewed within 3 to 5 business days once all required materials are in.

faq_answers.cost: The Pennsylvania State Board of Pharmacy snapshot lists a $30 initial pharmacy technician registration fee and a $70 biennial renewal fee.
faq_answers.timeline: Pennsylvania does not publish a pharmacy technician processing timeline on its public registration snapshot page. Check the board portal for status updates.

faq_answers.cost: Michigan lists a $137.70 pharmacy technician application and initial licensure fee, with a $61.20 renewal fee for the two-year cycle.
faq_answers.timeline: Michigan’s current licensing report says pharmacy technician applications average about 90 days from receipt to issuance.

quick_facts.processing_time: Allow 6 weeks before requesting a status update

reciprocity.processing_time: Allow 6 weeks before requesting a status update

faq_answers.cost: New York charges a $75 application fee plus a $100 first registration fee for registered pharmacy technicians. The triennial renewal fee is $100.
faq_answers.timeline: The New York Office of the Professions asks applicants to allow six weeks before requesting a status update on a pharmacy technician application.

faq_answers.cost: Illinois lists a $40 online application fee for pharmacy technician registration.
faq_answers.timeline: Illinois does not publish a public pharmacy technician processing timeline in the application checklist. Check the IDFPR portal for status updates.

quick_facts.fee_breakdown: $70 application fee + $45 national fingerprint background check fee

faq_answers.cost: Oregon’s pharmacy technician application totals $115: a $70 application fee plus a $45 national fingerprint background check fee. The board’s renewal FAQ lists a $104 renewal total before late fees.
faq_answers.timeline: The Oregon Board of Pharmacy says pharmacy technician applications usually take about 4 to 6 weeks to process once all materials are in.

quick_facts.renewal_cycle: Every 2 years (expires Dec 31 of odd-numbered years)
quick_facts.license_duration: Up to 2 Years (expires Dec 31 of odd-numbered years)

quick_facts.fee_breakdown: Application fee: $40.00, Compliance Resolution Fund fee: $25.00
New Pharmacy Technician Registration Fee: $50, Annual Renewal Fee: $50, Late Renewal Fee: $100
Application Fee: $100.00. (Additionally, a $75.00 background check fee is paid directly to the vendor, for a total initial cost of $175.00).
Initial Application Fee: $30.00, Criminal Background Check Fee: $44.00
Application Fee: $50.00, SC State Criminal Background Check Fee: $25.00
